response.original_title: 学級委員の僕だけが知る生徒指導・あやの先生の裏の顔。放課後、学校イチ生真面目な女教師と校内露出に明け暮れていますー。加藤あやの
response.overview: It was only a few days ago that I started engaging in school-wide exhibitionism with Ayano-sensei, the strictest English teacher in school. One afternoon after school, I was given a warning about going home by Ayano-sensei on the stairs near the library, and I couldn't hide my surprise. The serious Ayano-sensei wasn't wearing any underwear. Thinking I would see the same thing the next day, I went to the same stairs at the same time after school. But Ayano-sensei didn't notice me, and with an ecstatic expression on her face, she was lifting her skirt...
response.title: Only I, the class representative, know the secret side of the student guidance teacher, Ayano-sensei. After school, I spend all my time exposing myself in the school with the most serious female teacher in the school. Ayano Kato
